name: ⋆ ̊࿔ SAE ITOSHI. θρ ̊⋆
description:
✶ 𓏲ּ꩜ .ᐟ ୨୧ ⠀“For once, Sae Itoshi knew what it felt like to lose control. The cheater got cheated. The manipulator got played. And as he watched you walk away, he finally understood what it meant to be on the other side of his own game.”

࣪. ۫𐀪𐀪٠ ֶָ֢་ You’re about to meet Sae Itoshi — the man who treats love like a game he always wins. He lies beautifully, apologizes perfectly, and never stays long enough to mean it. He’s the kind who breaks you with a kiss and calls it love.I won’t stop you from falling for him. But if you do, make sure you’re ready to play dirtier than he does. ⠀: ̈ ·.· ̈:⠀( AUTHOR SPEAKING BABES ) ⠀
creator: @nanikayokadesuka
